overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing third-person driving through Night City's downtown district during dusk. The player navigates a futuristic pickup truck through neon-lit streets with heavy cyberpunk architecture, passing under overpasses and through intersections with moderate traffic.

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic pickup truck straight through the commercial district, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisements with Asian characters and bright colors
tall futuristic building with distinctive yellow structural support beams
building with multiple glowing signs and neon lighting
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide commercial street in a futuristic city at dusk. The camera follows a pickup truck driving past bright neon billboards and palm trees, with a distinctive yellow-beamed skyscraper dominating the center horizon. Other vehicles share the multi-lane road in moderate traffic.

events.description: passing under first overpass into narrower street canyon with towering buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing straight past the Militech corporate building, navigating through the denser urban canyon with reduced sky visibility

notable_agents.action: large dark truck passing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive dark corporate building with illuminated MILITECH signage
tall building with red facade and multiple parking levels
elevated highway crossing above the street creating a canopy effect

segments.scene_description: The truck passes under an overpass into a narrower urban canyon. The massive Militech building dominates the left side while a red industrial structure rises on the right. The street feels more enclosed with less natural light, relying on artificial illumination from building signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway under elevated transit system

events.description: entering deep shadow of overpass, artificial lighting becomes dominant
exiting underpass into more open intersection area with visible crosswalks

agents.ego_description: driving under the elevated highway system, emerging into a wider intersection with visible crosswalk markings

entered.detail: multi-level overpass structure with vehicles visible on upper decks
large screen displaying advertisements with cyan waveform graphics

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels beneath the elevated highway system in a sheltered corridor with artificial lighting. Large digital billboards line the right side. The truck then emerges from the underpass into a brighter area approaching a wide intersection with crosswalk markings.

events.description: crossing large intersection with broad yellow crosswalk markings while following traffic

agents.ego_description: navigating through a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk lines, following the flow of traffic straight ahead

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel in the left lane through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines spanning the multi-lane road
extremely tall modern building with illuminated windows rising prominently in the distance
palm trees lining the right sidewalk of the boulevard

segments.scene_description: The truck crosses a wide urban intersection marked with bold yellow crosswalk lines. A massive glass skyscraper dominates the view ahead, while palm trees line the right side of the boulevard. The scene opens up significantly compared to the previous enclosed canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with heavy concrete structures

events.description: entering covered area under massive highway interchange with concrete pillars
emerging from underpass back into open street with neon lighting and palm trees

agents.ego_description: driving under the massive highway interchange, navigating through the covered section and emerging back into the open boulevard

entered.detail: complex multi-level concrete overpass structure with heavy support pillars
building facade with bright pink and purple neon signage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes beneath a massive concrete highway interchange, temporarily entering a darker, sheltered zone with artificial lighting. After emerging, the street opens again with neon-lit buildings on the right and the tall glass skyscraper growing larger in the center view.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the main boulevard with towering skyscrapers on both sides, maintaining steady cruise speed

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: dense group of extremely tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
continuous row of palm trees along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the truck cruising down a broad downtown boulevard flanked by towering skyscrapers with bright neon lighting. Palm trees line the right sidewalk while dense clusters of futuristic high-rises fill the horizon. The scene maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon illumination against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis, transitioning from wide commercial avenues into enclosed urban canyons before opening back up into a towering downtown district. It begins on a broad street at dusk, following a pickup truck past bright billboards and palm trees toward a yellow-beamed skyscraper. As the vehicle passes under an overpass, the environment shifts into a narrow, shadowed corridor dominated by the massive Militech building and red industrial structures, before moving through a sheltered highway system lined with digital signage. The scene then expands as the truck crosses a wide intersection with bold yellow markings, momentarily dipping back into the darkness of a concrete interchange before emerging once more into the light. Finally, the view opens onto a grand boulevard flanked by dense clusters of glowing high-rises and palm trees, with the darkening sky contrasting against the heavy neon illumination of the city center.
